MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on August 3, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a courtesy copy of the petition and a proposed order have not been provided. The First and Final Report of Administration, etc. is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
